name: Talked to insurance adjuster about my poisoning claim—did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster about my poisoning claim—did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly, if you admitted non-work causes; statements can be used against you.[6] Adjusters seek denial ammo in ODA claims.[1] Key factors: recorded inconsistencies, lack of lawyer. Review what was said, get claim status, cease solo talks. Lawyer protects now.
